scripts.build:ios: xcodebuild -workspace ios/Volt.xcworkspace -scheme Volt -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' build
scripts.fastlane:lanes: FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle bundle exec fastlane lanes
scripts.ios:fastlane:build: FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle bundle exec fastlane ios build
scripts.ios:archive: FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle bundle exec fastlane ios archive
scripts.ios:beta: FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle bundle exec fastlane ios beta
scripts.ios:screenshots: FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle bundle exec fastlane ios screenshots
scripts.ios:screenshots:upload: FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle bundle exec fastlane ios upload_screenshots
scripts.ios:screenshots:frame: FASTLANE_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1 BUNDLE_PATH=vendor/bundle bundle exec fastlane ios frameit_screenshots
